title: If Nerv headquarters was real
wikitext:
[]: If Nerv headquarters was real...             Quote Post by SHINOBI-03 » Sun Apr 08, 2012 7:04 am Do you think it'll look like this? http://www.famedubai.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/09/raffles-dubai-in-wafi-city-dubai-uae.jpg http://www.mattress-leader.com/india/images/stories/hospitality/Raffles%20Wafi.jpg http://www.hyderconsulting.com/en/editorial/PublishingImages/Services/raffles%20hotel_wafi%20overall_BuildingandIT.jpg What you're looking at is a hotel in Dubai, UAE called Raffles Dubai, and it's part of an Egyptian-themed shopping mall called Wafi. And to tell you what, every time I look at it I remember Nerv Headquarters and I imagine Unit 1 on top of it. Oh, and... long time no see fellas.

[]: If Nerv headquarters was real...             Quote Post by SHINOBI-03 » Sun Apr 08, 2012 7:04 am Do you think it'll look like this? http://www.famedubai.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/09/raffles-dubai-in-wafi-city-dubai-uae.jpg http://www.mattress-leader.com/india/images/stories/hospitality/Raffles%20Wafi.jpg http://www.hyderconsulting.com/en/editorial/PublishingImages/Services/raffles%20hotel_wafi%20overall_BuildingandIT.jpg What you're looking at is a hotel in Dubai, UAE called Raffles Dubai, and it's part of an Egyptian-themed shopping mall called Wafi. And to tell you what, every time I look at it I remember Nerv Headquarters and I imagine Unit 1 on top of it. Oh, and... long time no see fellas.
